introSection: Insane is an Intamin ZacSpin roller coaster located at Gröna Lund in Stockholm, Sweden. The total cost of the ride was 50,000,000 Kronor ($7,226,000 USD).

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Insane opened as the first of Intamin's second largest ZacSpin model, with the other copy being Green Lantern: First Flight, which opened at Six Flags Magic Mountain in 2011.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Single car trains. Riders are arranged 4 across in 2 rows for a total of 8 riders per car.

fullText:
Insane is an Intamin ZacSpin roller coaster located at Gröna Lund in Stockholm, Sweden. The total cost of the ride was 50,000,000 Kronor ($7,226,000 USD).

Insane opened as the first of Intamin's second largest ZacSpin model, with the other copy being Green Lantern: First Flight, which opened at Six Flags Magic Mountain in 2011.

Single car trains. Riders are arranged 4 across in 2 rows for a total of 8 riders per car.
